mapper.insert: insert into chat_messages(room_id, sender_id, message_text, created_at) values(#{roomId},#{senderId},#{messageText},#{createdAt})
mapper.select: select user_id from room_members where room_id = #{roomId} and member_status = 'ACTIVE'
select last_read_message_id from room_members where room_id=#{roomId} and user_id=#{userId} and member_status = 'ACTIVE'
